AXVA70R Ascent Sedan 4dr Spts Auto 8sp 2.5i Toyota's mid-size, front-drive imported sedan is based on the company's Mk8 platform and is lower, longer, stiffer and sportier than previous, Australian-built Camrys. Updated in early 2021 with new looks and revised interior, the range comprises Ascent, Ascent Sport, the sporty SX and the luxury SL, all available with the 4.2L/100km 160 combined-kilowatt 2.5-litre petrol-electric hybrid. With the V6 discontinued, only the base SX is available with a conventional petrol engine: the 152kW "Dynamic Force" 2.5-litre coupled to a new, economy-inducing eight-speed auto transmission. Autonomous emergency braking, active cruise control, lane-keep assist, auto high-beam and LED headlights are universal. A 60/40 split-fold rear backrest augments the spacious boot.

The estimated valuation range takes into account your car make, model, year and odometer reading but does not account for other factors such as condition, colour, options and location.
